title: Ergos 2 & 3 Plus Arc Visor
shortDescription: Increased worker safety because of REAL VIEW of work environment.. A3:A31New generation of face protection against the thermal hazards and impact of an arc flash. A3:A31Tested to EN 166 for protection against molten metals & hot solids

features: Increased worker safety because of REAL VIEW of work environment.
A3:A31New generation of face protection against the thermal hazards and impact of an arc flash
A3:A31Tested to EN 166 for protection against molten metals & hot solids
